titles.title: This World Is Not My Home

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This world it's not my home Im just a passing through My treasures are laid up Some where beyond the blue The angels beckon me From heavens open door And I can't fell at home And this world anymore

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Lord you know I have no friend like you If heavens not my home Then Lord what will I do The angeles beckon me Frome heavens open door And I can't feel at home And this world anymore

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There all expecting me And that's one thing I know My savior pardoned me And now I onward go I know hell take me through Though I am weak and poor And I can't feel at home In this world anymore

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just up a glory land We'll live eternally The saint of every hand Are shouting victory This songs of sweetest praise Drift back from heaven's shore And I can fell at home in this world anymore
